---
title: "Artificial Intelligence Overview"
format: pptx
---

## Artificial Intelligence: An Overview

- Exploring the technology reshaping our world
- From research to real-world impact
- Current trends, applications, and future outlook

## What Is Artificial Intelligence?

- Simulation of human intelligence by machines
- Encompasses learning, reasoning, and problem-solving
- Types: Narrow AI (task-specific) vs. General AI (human-like)
- Evolved from rule-based systems to advanced neural networks
- Now embedded in everyday tools and enterprise systems

## Key AI Technologies

- Machine Learning — algorithms that learn from data
- Deep Learning — neural networks with multiple layers
- Natural Language Processing — understanding human language
- Computer Vision — interpreting visual information
- Generative AI — creating new content (text, images, code)
- Reinforcement Learning — learning through trial and reward

## Real-World Applications

- Healthcare — diagnostics, drug discovery, personalized treatment
- Finance — fraud detection, algorithmic trading, risk assessment
- Retail — recommendation engines, inventory optimization
- Manufacturing — predictive maintenance, quality control
- Transportation — autonomous vehicles, route optimization
- Education — personalized learning, automated grading

## Benefits of AI

- Automation of repetitive and time-consuming tasks
- Faster, data-driven decision making
- Improved accuracy and reduced human error
- 24/7 availability without fatigue
- Scalability across industries and use cases
- Enhanced customer experiences through personalization
- Unlocking insights from large, complex datasets

## Challenges and Risks

- Bias and fairness in AI decision-making
- Job displacement and workforce transformation
- Privacy concerns with data collection and usage
- Lack of transparency and explainability
- Security vulnerabilities and adversarial attacks
- Regulatory and ethical compliance gaps
- Over-reliance on AI systems without human oversight

## Future Trends and Outlook

- Multimodal AI combining text, image, audio, and video
- AI agents that autonomously plan and execute tasks
- Edge AI — running models on devices for low latency
- AI-driven scientific discovery and research acceleration
- Stricter regulation and governance frameworks
- Human-AI collaboration as the new standard of work
- Responsible AI development with built-in safety measures

## Thank You

- AI is transforming every industry — the question is how, not if
- Stay informed, adapt quickly, and use AI responsibly
- Questions?
